name: @contextractor/apify
description: Apify Actor that crawls websites and extracts main-content text. Built on rs-trafilatura and Crawlee.

scripts.build: pnpm run fix && pnpm -F @contextractor/gen-input-schema start && pnpm -w docs:update && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.fix: biome check . --fix --unsafe && biome format --write . && biome check .
